emotional_tone: Playful yet elegant, magical, premium consumer iOS aesthetic

typography.primary_font_weight_rules: Use font-semibold for H1-H3, font-medium for buttons.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-indigo-600 text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-md
buttons.magic: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-500 via-purple-500 to-pink-500 text-white font-semibold px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white dark:bg-[#2C2C2E] text-[#1C1C1E] dark:text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700

cards.base: rounded-3xl bg-white dark:bg-[#1C1C1E] p-6 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] dark:shadow-none border border-transparent dark:border-[#38383A] overflow-hidden

component_styles.inputs: rounded-xl bg-gray-100 dark:bg-[#2C2C2E] border-none px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:outline-none transition-all
component_styles.navigation_bar: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-20 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/80 dark:bg-black/80 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 flex justify-around items-center pb-4 z-50
component_styles.header: sticky top-0 w-full backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/80 dark:bg-black/80 z-40 px-4 py-3 flex justify-between items-center

grids_and_layouts.app_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#F2F2F7] dark:bg-black relative pb-24 shadow-2xl overflow-x-hidden
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Use p-4 or p-6 for screen edges. Use gap-4 or gap-6 for lists and grids.
grids_and_layouts.bento_grid: For the gallery/history tab, use a masonry or tight 2-column grid (grid-cols-2 gap-3) with rounded-2xl items.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slide up or fade-in using Framer Motion (initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Scale down (scale: 0.95) on button tap/press. Scale up (scale: 1.05) on hover.
motion_and_interactions.loading_state: Do not use generic spinners. Use a pulsating magic gradient or a sequential glowing effect to indicate AI processing.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Use pure white text on the magic gradient.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for animations.

key_screens.onboarding: Full-screen visually striking image. Large H1 text. Magical gradient 'Get Started' button at the bottom.
key_screens.home_tab: Sticky header with user avatar. 'Surprise Me' large hero card. Horizontal scrollable list for 'Featured Categories'. Vertical list for 'Recent Transformations'.
key_screens.photo_upload: Camera viewfinder simulation or large bordered dropzone (rounded-3xl). Input field for 'Pet Name' (optional).
key_screens.category_picker: Grid of 40+ themes. Each card has an icon/image and bold title. Grouped by sections (Fantasy, Occupations, Eras).
key_screens.loading_screen: Immersive. Dark background. Glowing orb or scanning animation over the pet's photo. 'Analyzing personality...' text.
key_screens.results_carousel: Swiper/Carousel of 5 unique transformations. Each slide is a full card with the portrait, creative name, occupation, and funny biography.
key_screens.result_detail: Large portrait taking upper 50% of screen. Content below in a bottom sheet style layout. Action row for: Regenerate, Edit, Favorite, Share.
key_screens.share_template_picker: Horizontal list of templates (Movie Poster, Polaroid, etc.). Live preview in the center.
key_screens.paywall: Premium layout. Dark mode by default for luxury feel. Golden or Magic gradient highlights. 'Unlimited HD, No Watermarks'.
key_screens.admin_dashboard: Desktop-optimized view. Sidebar navigation. Data tables with Shadcn UI.

onboarding_hero.description: Cute white and brown small dog wearing a santa hat looking at camera, conveying fun and dressing up.

category_thumbnail_1.description: Dog in yellow turtleneck, good for 'Human/CEO' category reference.

category_thumbnail_2.description: Cute cat looking directly at camera, good for 'Surprise Me' or basic cat reference.

magazine_template_bg.description: Premium magazine cover layout reference for the 'Share Template' feature.

instructions_to_main_agent.framework: React JS with Tailwind CSS, using Shadcn primitives heavily customized to look like a native iOS app.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_wrapper: Use a mobile app constraint layout (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto) for the web app to feel like an iOS device screen if viewed on desktop. On actual mobile, it should take 100% width/height.
instructions_to_main_agent.theming: Implement a robust Dark/Light mode toggle defaulting to System. Use Tailwind's dark mode class strategy.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use Framer Motion extensively for page transitions, sheet sliding (bottom-up), and micro-interactions on taps.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Do NOT use standard web dropdowns or native inputs. Use custom styled elements or Shadcn dialogs/drawers to mimic iOS Bottom Sheets and pickers.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Inputs must be large (h-12 or h-14), rounded-xl, with subtle gray backgrounds and no aggressive borders. Use Apple-style placeholder text.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do not use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for headers and bottom tab bars.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container text by default. Keep text left-aligned for readability.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped (rounded-full) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like robot/brain/crystal ball for icons. Use clean Lucide or Phosphor icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, tap states, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute for robust testing.
Use sonner for toast notifications (located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx).
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos/images) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN. Always use provided image URLs.
